Option 01
RE for Alexandria NEW

RE/NEW for Alexandria — AlexRenew

Every time you use water,
it goes somewhere.

The water that leaves homes and businesses is treated, cleaned, and returned safely to the river. It's one of the most important systems most people never have to think about — because it's being managed every day.

What's New Pay My Bill

The System at Work

Handled with care: A shared system

Since 1956, we've treated the water that flows through Alexandria every day. What moves through homes and businesses becomes part of a shared system — and keeping it working takes scale, precision, and constant oversight.

Each year, that means:

13B+ gallons treated
300K+ people served
2,400t nitrogen removed
300t phosphorus removed
≈0 bacteria remaining
Looking ahead →

An adaptable system that stays reliable, accessible, and ready for what comes next. Long-term planning keeps the infrastructure ahead of growth and climate demands.

Every day impact →

Clean water returns to area neighborhoods — protecting health and the environment for the whole community, every single day without interruption.

What guides us →

This work is tested, verified, and designed to last time, going beyond compliance to reduce impact over time. Science and accountability drive every decision.

Investing in the Community

Helping protect
what matters

This work goes beyond treating wastewater. It shows up in the places people gather, the river that runs through our city, and the everyday health of the community.

These investments show up in shared spaces, local partnerships, and environmental improvements. They help keep Alexandria a place people can count on and be proud of.

Community Benefits Water Management

Community Wins

What this work makes possible,
every day

Sustainability is built in. Water is reused. Energy is generated. Less is wasted. More than 1 billion gallons of water are reused each year, cutting the need for drinking water to be used in operations by nearly 97%.

Methane from the treatment process

Helps power the facility, covering about 50% of our natural gas needs.

→

What It Takes

Behind it all, the numbers tell the
real story

Each number reflects the work being done and outcomes that truly matter — protecting public health, caring for the river, and keeping this system strong for the long run.

40M gallons treated
390K residents served
100% renewable energy goal
70 years serving Alexandria

In Action

Where the work becomes real

The news and stories from across the watershed. Where we track progress, share milestones, and show how this work impacts the community of Alexandria, daily.
